comments: Information of tracklisting from Hal C F Astell's website.
Long interview with Joe Elliott of Def Leppard.

Before the Mott the Hoople track, Joe Elliott mentions that the Dogs D'Amour will be supporting Hunter/Ronson 'this week': that was 15 Feb 1989. After it, they talk about the two dates the coming week at the Dominion Theater, which were 15 and 16 Feb 1989. According to Mick Ronson's site, Joe Elliott appeared on the former. That dates this show to 10 Feb 1989. Also, Def Leppard are preparing for the Brit Awards, which were on 13 Feb 1989. TV hopes that Leppard will win Best British Group, but they lost out to Erasure.
Tommy ends by mentioning that he should have played a Snyper session in this show but didn't. He'll reschedule.

track_listing.track: 'Is There Rock 'N Roll In Heaven (LP-What Do You Know About Rock 'N Roll?)' (Jive)
The Boys Are Back In Town

track_listing.artist: Stumpus Maximus & the Good Ol' Boys Pseudonym for Def Leppard.
